content: هُوَّ شَخص عَنيد وَضِفْ إلى ذَلِكَ إنَّه مِش شَاطِر

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa shachsaAaneed wa diff 'ila zalik 'in|uh mish shaatir

relationships: eng:he is a stubborn person, furthermore he is not clever
